package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_collection_iteration_multiple_passes_for_independent_counts: Layer: Collection iteration. Flag multiple full passes over the same slice for independent counters that can be combined.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule517NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario517Negative(records []Rule517NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
